query: SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.totalAmount, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice FROM `orders` o LEFT JOIN `order_items` oi ON o.id = oi.orderId WHERE oi.productName LIKE '%Rocher%' ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 20;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zuxFhcSmgfRMF3Y.5443ef0e52ed --database 7xKVuVPoe4TavcqcxPZkpC --execute SELECT o.id, o.orderNumber, o.totalAmount, oi.productName, oi.quantity, oi.unitPrice FROM `orders` o LEFT JOIN `order_items` oi ON o.id = oi.orderId WHERE oi.productName LIKE '%Rocher%' ORDER BY o.id DESC LIMIT 20;
